worklog.title: Notification reliability overhaul (Batch 1 + 2)
worklog.summary: Foundation pass: USE_EXACT_ALARM permission (Android 14+ default-deny fix), stable per-prayer-per-day identifiers (`adhan_${prayer}_${YYYY-MM-DD}`), idempotent diff-based scheduling instead of cancel-all-then-recreate, default `nudgeEnabled: false` (most-reported "duplicate adhan" cause), removed iOS foreground double-playback, singleton listener guard, unified Test button. Hardening pass: self-heal listener on AppState 'active' that re-runs scheduling when scheduled count drops below threshold (catches OEM kills on Xiaomi/Samsung/Realme), versioned per-prayer channels (`adhan-fajr-v2`, etc.) with auto-bump on sound change, permission-revoked detection with `notificationsBlocked` / `timeSensitiveBlocked` flags, new Notification Health screen at /settings/notification-health (count, next 5, permissions, re-schedule action, OS settings deep link).

worklog.title: PostHog product-feature event capture
worklog.summary: Previously only lifecycle events flowed (Application Opened/Backgrounded). Now captures: `quran_played` (surah, ayah, reciter, mode), `prayer_marked_done` (prayer, on_time — best-effort via cachedPrayerTimes within ±6h), `bookmark_added` (verse + page variants), `translation_downloaded` (edition, verse_count), `surah_opened`, `mushaf_opened`, `feature_opened` (home tools grid), `adhan_notification_opened` (via singleton response listener filtered on data.type='adhan'). All gated on null-safe wrapper; non-throwing.

worklog.title: Mushaf layout migration to verified Madani source
worklog.summary: User-reported "many ayah ending mistakes" was a layout bug, not a text bug. Old generator used quran.com word-level `line_number` calibrated for QPC glyph fonts — when rendered as plain Uthmani text, end-of-verse markers (numerals) appeared on the line AFTER where the verse actually finishes. Sample of 30 random pages: 15/30 had at least one misplaced marker, 60 total mismatched lines. Wrote new generator using King Fahd Madani layout reference (zonetecde/mushaf-layout) for line/page boundaries, kept quran.com `text_uthmani` for verse text (text itself was correct). Regenerated `assets/data/mushaf-pages.json`: 0/30 mismatches after fix. Schema unchanged — fully backward-compatible. Added `npm run generate:mushaf:tanzil` script.

worklog.title: Sentry production-error guards
worklog.summary: Two top Sentry issues (8 events / 6 users + 6 events / 4 users in 24h) traced to missing try/catch: 1. `ExpoLocation.removeWatchAsync rejected` in qibla screen cleanup — wrapped each `.remove()` call individually so failure on one doesn't prevent the other; logs via `console.warn`, doesn't throw from cleanup. 2. `NativeDatabase.prepareSync rejected` in offline translation manager — wrapped all 5 sync DB calls (runSync, getFirstSync, getAllSync) with sensible fallbacks: `false` for isDownloaded checks, `[]` for getDownloadedEditions, `0` for verse count, structured throws for downloadTranslation so callers can surface to user. 3. Module.swift `updateActivity` and `endActivity` converted to `AsyncFunction` (matching `startActivity` from earlier commit) — eliminates fire-and-forget pattern where JS got "ended" before ActivityKit work completed.

worklog.title: Word-by-word Quran audio synchronisation
worklog.summary: Previously highlighting was tap-driven only — no connection to audio playback. Now: when audio is playing the displayed ayah AND the reciter is in the QDC-supported set (Mishary 7, Sudais 2, Abdul Basit 1, Husary 5), fetch per-word timing data from `api.qurancdn.com/api/qdc/audio/reciters/{id}/audio_files` (audio_segments tuples), increase `expo-audio` `updateInterval` from default 500ms to 100ms, and drive `activeWordIndex` from current playback position. Bounded-LRU cache (50 entries), Hermes-safe AbortController + setTimeout (replaced `AbortSignal.timeout` which crashes on Hermes), full-surah mode gated to prevent stale per-ayah timings during full-surah playback.

worklog.title: iOS widget bridge + Live Activity race fix + design parity
worklog.summary: Bridge: `checkWidgetBridgeAvailable()` exposed for early-return guards, `__DEV__` console.warn when native module is null (was silent no-op). Live Activity `startActivity` converted from `Function` + `Task { }` (race: end-old + request-new fired in parallel, ActivityKit's 1-activity-per-app limit silently rejected the new request) to `AsyncFunction` with sequential `await` of all `activity.end()` before `Activity.request()`. Design pass: 1px white@0.12 ContainerRelativeShape stroke on NextPrayer + PrayerTimes widgets, 3-stop deeper gradient (0/0.6/1.0), gold (#E2C98B) accent for secondary text (countdown timer, location), Live Activity lock screen wrapped in ZStack with gradient bg + RoundedRectangle 16pt border.

worklog.title: Quran screen performance pass
worklog.summary: FlatList perf: extracted `SurahListItem` as top-level `memo()` component, `renderItem` and handlers wrapped in `useCallback`, `ListHeaderComponent` JSX moved into `useMemo`, fixed `directAyahMatch` raw-const dep that busted `filteredSurahs` memo every render. `[surah].tsx`: `loadVerses` useCallback with correct deps, `renderItem` useCallback, `ListFooterComponent` useMemo, all bookmark handlers memoized. `mushaf.tsx`: `pageTitle`, `currentVerseKey`, `gridSlots`, `panResponder` useMemo. Then second pass: extracted 5 inline style array literals from inside `SurahListItem` body to defeat shallow-comparison bypass; removed unused `width` dep from `panResponder` deps array. Final pass: `[surah].tsx` switched from full-store destructure to 5 sliced `useAudioStore(s => ...)` selectors so the screen doesn't re-render 10×/sec under Task 9's faster tick rate.

worklog.title: Reciter URL audit (full-surah mode)
worklog.summary: Live-tested all reciter URLs against quranicaudio.com/qdc CDN. 5 wrong slugs corrected (Husary murattal, Husary muallim, Minshawy murattal, Abu Bakr Shatri, Yasser Ad-Dussary). 15 reciters had no QDC entry — `fullSurahSlug` removed from those entries; they fall back cleanly to per-ayah everyayah.com (all per-ayah URLs tested clean). All 25 reciters preserved in the array.

worklog.title: iPhone haptic feedback throughout app
worklog.summary: expo-haptics added to: play/pause buttons (Medium impact), surah navigation (Light), bookmark add (Success notification), prayer mark-done (Success), prayer un-mark (Light), Mushaf page nav (Light), Mushaf bookmark add (Success). No haptic on tap-only interactions to avoid noise.

worklog.title: iOS time-sensitive prayer notifications
worklog.summary: Added `interruptionLevel: 'timeSensitive'` to both adhan + nudge notification content (iOS 15+ — bypasses Focus mode for users who grant Time Sensitive permission). Explicit iOS permission flags in `requestPermissionsAsync`: `{ ios: { allowAlert: true, allowSound: true, allowBadge: true } }`. Schedule horizon extended from "today only" to 7 days × 5 prayers = 35 notifications max (well under iOS 64-limit). Then removed invalid option `allowDisplayInNotificationCenter` (not part of expo-notifications iOS permission shape).

worklog.title: Multi-surah Mushaf page audio continuation
worklog.summary: When a Mushaf page contains two surahs (one ending mid-page, the next starting), pressing play would play through the first surah's verses then stop dead — the audio system had no way to know what came next. Fix: `mushaf.tsx togglePlayPause` now builds a `pageQueue` from `page.verses` (surahNumber + ayahNumber pairs) and passes it as a 6th arg to `audioStore.loadAndPlay`. The store carries the queue; on per-ayah finish, it consults the queue for the next entry instead of incrementing within the current surah.

worklog.title: Audio pause race condition + ayah-by-ayah fix
worklog.summary: Pause was being ignored when tapped during async audio load (player.play() would fire after pause completed). Fix: module-level `pauseRequested` flag, set true on every pause(), checked just before `player.play()` is called inside loadAndPlay; if pauseRequested is true, skip play() entirely. `set({ isPlaying: false })` moved outside `if (player)` guard so isPlaying tracks user intent regardless of player state. AppState subscription stored as `_appStateSub` to prevent leaks; `stop()` clears `pageQueue = null`. Ayah-by-ayah play/pause unblocked by same flag mechanism.

worklog.title: Operations dashboard scaffolded
worklog.summary: Built the .dashboard/ refresher (Node stdlib, no deps), GitHub Actions workflow, public deeni-dashboard scaffold, password-gated Linear-style HTML, alert engine, and STATUS.md generator. Plan in DASHBOARD_PLAN.md. Awaiting first run after Phase 0 token setup.

worklog.title: iOS widgets premium redesign
worklog.summary: Live ticking countdown via Text(timerInterval:countsDown:), accent-rail next-prayer highlight on the Times widget, gold pull-quote treatment on Daily Dua, oversized quote-glyph backdrop on Daily Hadith. iOS 18 tinted-mode safe via widgetAccentable + widgetRenderingMode environment.

worklog.title: iOS Next Prayer widget stuck on "in 0:00"
worklog.summary: Root cause: src/widgets/syncWidgetData.tsx returned early on iOS so App Group group.in.deen.app was never written. Widget fell back to placeholder sample, system overlaid stale-data spinner. Fix: bridge through requireNativeModule('ReactNativeWidgetExtension')'s setString + reloadAllTimelines, wire 7-day schedule sync via syncPrayerScheduleToWidget.

worklog.title: DB + OTA hardening
worklog.summary: WAL journal_mode + foreign_keys=ON pragmas on every open; AppState listener that re-opens the SQLite handle on Android foreground after potential TRIM_MEMORY invalidation; runtimeVersion switched from hardcoded "1.3.4" to { policy: "fingerprint" }; Sentry tags for app.version / platform / build.number; bootstrap captureException; DB breadcrumbs in offline.ts.

worklog.title: v1.4.0 bump + expo-audio migration
worklog.summary: Migrated adhanPlayer + ruqyah screen from deprecated expo-av to expo-audio. Wrapped void-returning setActiveForLockScreen / clearLockScreenControls in try/catch instead of .catch(). Added optional context/repetitions/quranRefs to RuqyahVerse. bump-version.mjs now keeps semver, versionCode, buildNumber, and package.json synced in lockstep.

fieldNotes.notes: StatusBarModule, WindowUtilKt, BottomSheetDialog, SheetDialog all use deprecated APIs (setStatusBarColor, setNavigationBarColor, LAYOUT_IN_DISPLAY_CUTOUT_MODE_*). These come from React Native + Material Components, not our own code. Fix path: upgrade RN when it migrates to WindowInsetsControllerCompat. Non-blocking for v1.6.0.

fieldNotes.description: Portrait orientation lock ignored on Android 16 large screens
fieldNotes.notes: Android 16 will ignore android:screenOrientation="PORTRAIT" on tablets/foldables. Our UI is portrait-only by design. Fix in v1.6.1: support landscape on large screens (resize-friendly layouts), keep portrait on phones. Non-blocking for v1.6.0.
When swiping left/right to navigate pages, content disappears. Only works correctly when tapping the down arrow button. PanResponder logic likely racing with page state. Hot fix.

fieldNotes.description: Mushaf: many ayahs missing from pages
fieldNotes.notes: After Tanzil layout migration, some pages are missing verses. Need to compare regenerated mushaf-pages.json against expected per-surah ayah counts (6,236 total). Hot fix.
Mushaf doesn't look like a printed Quran. Spacing, typography, line-height, gold accents, page borders all need polish to match Madani Mushaf print aesthetic.

fieldNotes.description: Mushaf: reciter / player not working properly
fieldNotes.notes: Audio playback on mushaf has bugs (specifics to investigate). May be related to pageQueue logic introduced in v1.6.0.

fieldNotes.description: Word-by-word: no surah picker, no next button
fieldNotes.notes: Word-by-word screen lacks navigation controls. User can't pick which surah to study, and there's no "next" button at the end of an ayah/surah to continue. Hot fix.

fieldNotes.description: Surah reader mini-player: pause button doesn't work
fieldNotes.notes: On the read page (surah reader), pause button on the bottom mini-player doesn't pause audio. Pause works from the full-screen music player but not from the embedded MiniPlayer. Likely a wiring bug after recent MiniPlayer changes (sleep timer + loop modes). Hot fix.

fieldNotes.description: Lock screen / notification media controls missing
fieldNotes.notes: When playing full Quran audio, no media controls show in iOS lock screen, Android notification, or in either platform's native media center. expo-audio audioMode is set for background playback but lock screen / now-playing info isn't wired. Critical for background listening UX. May need MPNowPlayingInfoCenter (iOS) + MediaSession (Android) setup. Hot fix.

fieldNotes.description: v1.7.0 Mushaf cartouche overlaps verses + bismillah inside it
fieldNotes.notes: The new cartouche is rendering with truncated Arabic ("سُو" instead of "سُورَة"), bismillah is inside the cartouche box (should be below), English label "AL-FATIHA"/"AL-BAQARAH" overlapping verse text underneath. On special pages (Al-Fatiha, Al-Baqarah opening) the cartouche dominates and verses clip below. Triple gold borders feel cluttered. Page footer "Juz 1 · Page X · Al-Fatiha" colliding with bottom toolbar.

"Download Failed: Call to function 'FileSystem.downloadFileAsync' has been rejected. → Caused by: response has status: 404." The QPC_FONT_BASE_URL in qpcFontDownloader.ts was a placeholder pointing to nuqayah/qpc-fonts repo with WRONG filename pattern (QCF2NNN.ttf vs actual QCF2_001.TTF). Either fix URL pattern or move to a real CDN. Hot fix. [RESOLVED v1.7.1: branch was main, upstream is master. Live HTTP 200 verified.]

fieldNotes.description: Surah reader: per-ayah pause button doesn't actually pause
fieldNotes.notes: On the surah reader (`app/quran/[surah].tsx`), each ayah card shows a play/pause icon. When audio is playing, the icon shows pause (green) but tapping it does NOT pause audio. The MiniPlayer at the bottom DOES pause correctly. So the wiring of the per-ayah onPlayPress handler is broken. Likely either (a) handler stale closure, (b) handler calls play() instead of pause() when playing, or (c) calling loadAndPlay again on the same verse doesn't toggle. Hot fix.

fieldNotes.description: Word-by-word tap plays AUDIO for a different word
fieldNotes.notes: (RE-OPEN) "In word-by-word, when select some word audio is of different." Re-reported after v1.6.x "fix". The earlier fix (commit cd6e167) was for visual highlight conflict — the implementer confirmed "Hypothesis E (visual)" and didn't touch the audio path. But the user's complaint is about AUDIO, not visual. Likely real cause: off-by-one in word.position vs index in audio_url, or filter shifting indices. Need re-investigation focused on the AUDIO mapping.

fieldNotes.description: Android: "Add widget from app" option missing/broken
fieldNotes.notes: When user opens Settings on Android, there's no working option to pin/add a widget to the home screen from inside the app. WidgetPinModule.kt + WidgetPinPackage.kt exist (Kotlin native module for requestPinAppWidget), and JS bridge at src/services/widgetPinner.ts exists, but the Settings UI either doesn't show the buttons or the buttons don't trigger. Investigation needed — could be JS bridge mis-wired, or settings screen missing the row, or native module not registering on master (similar to the untracked Swift files we just fixed).

fieldNotes.description: Android: deen.in widget previews missing in system widget chooser
fieldNotes.notes: When user long-presses Android home screen → Widgets → scrolls to deen.in, the widget previews (thumbnails for PrayerTimes / NextPrayer / DailyHadith / DailyDua / PrayerDuaCombo) are blank/missing. Should show a rendered preview of each widget. Likely cause: previewImage drawables not in android/app/src/main/res/drawable/, OR scripts/generate-widget-previews.mjs hasn't been run, OR generated PNGs aren't tracked in git (similar pattern to the source files we found untracked earlier). iOS widget preview status not yet checked by user.

fieldNotes.description: Word-by-word: tap-to-play maps to wrong word
fieldNotes.notes: "In word-by-word, when I click a word the audio is for next or another one." Likely root causes: off-by-one in word.position indexing (1-indexed in API vs 0-indexed in render), OR audio_url field shifted by one due to char_type_name filter ('word' vs 'end'), OR state race between tap-driven selectedWordId and playback-driven activeWordIndex (added in v1.6.0). Specific to src/components/quran/WordByWordVerse.tsx onPress handler. Fixed in commit cd6e167 (hypothesis E confirmed — visual highlight conflict, not audio).

fieldNotes.description: "Could not load verses" / NativeDatabase prepareSync rejection on translation read
fieldNotes.notes: When opening a surah with translation enabled, user sees error: "Could not load verses. Call to function 'NativeDatabase.prepareSync' has been rejected. Caused by: java.lang.NullPointerException." This is in the Drizzle path (loadVersesFromDB at app/quran/[surah].tsx), different code path than the offline.ts sync DB calls we guarded in v1.6.0 (commit 7684acf). DB handle may be null when Drizzle calls prepareSync. Hot fix needed.

"More translations has more than 492 editions, what is the real use case? Doesn't feel like a useful thing for us." Need to: research best-practice translation curation (Quran.com web, Muslim Pro, iQuran), curate ~20-30 popular editions, group by language with featured/recommended tags, show full list as "Browse all" for advanced users. Quality-of-life fix for v1.7.x.

Current surah pickers (Quran tab list, Mushaf jump modal, Word-by-word picker) are basic 114-item scrollable lists. Need better discoverability: search, grouping (Juz / Makki vs Madani / length), Arabic + English names side by side, recent/favorites, quick-jump by number. Build a shared SurahPicker component used everywhere.
